title: Ivar Giaever
body: Ivar Giaever (April 5, 1929 – June 20, 2025) was a Norwegian–American experimental physicist who shared the 1973 Nobel Prize in Physics with Leo Esaki and Brian Josephson. One half of the prize was jointly awarded to Esaki and Giaever "for their experimental discoveries regarding tunneling phenomena in semiconductors and superconductors, respectively."
categories: Fellows of the American Physical Society
Members of the Norwegian Academy of Science and Letters
Members of the United States National Academy of Sciences
